creator: rz-rpi03@h-ka.de
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #4)
I support the idea of getting it right.

Unfortunately my knowledge is not deep enough to implement it right.
Especially when (USB) device nodes and reading the LED configuration from
onboard EEPROM are involved.

What I can do is to change it to work the other way round:
Leaving the LED as it is (aka do nothing), if the FDT device node is not found.
Such we could leave the interface "as its defaults are", till someone with
better knowledge fills out the missing parts.

Hm, I see there is a lan78xx_eeprom_present() function. So there could be a way
to get it done with my current knowledge and time I can spent on this.
